purpose: Tie the active P10 governance batch to final convergence gates, commit checkpoints, ignored runtime paths, skip-report policy, known risks, and release-blocking verification.

aiflowExecution.goflyImpact: P10 tasks were submitted through root aiflow.yaml and completed locally with per-task commits because aiflow project policy disables commit and push; the current agent or human owns commit and push.

previousBatchHandoff.reason: P9 convergence was carried forward into the P10 active batch convergence contract after the root aiflow.yaml workflow was rebuilt and P10 tasks completed through local ignored .aiflow runtime state.
previousBatchHandoff.completionPolicy: complete GOFLY-P10-10-CONVERGENCE-REPORT through aiflow after make governance-boundary-inventory-check, make governance-report-check, and make governance-10-rounds pass or document any environment-limited downgrade, with commits owned by the current agent or human

knownRisks.status: P10 cloud-native adoption proof links reference app topology and runtime SLOs, but live Docker-backed dependency proof still depends on a host with Docker credential helper access.
knownRisks.followUp: Run the Docker-backed reference app in CI or a host with docker-credential-desktop available before treating live dependency proof as complete.

knownRisks.status: P10 performance budget ratchet keeps weak latency rows report-only and blocks only promoted allocation budgets until trend confidence and rollback evidence mature.
knownRisks.followUp: Promote only after five baseline samples, three current trend samples, allocation budget evidence, explicit latency ratio, and rollback guidance exist.

knownRisks.status: P10 exposes release readiness, API tiers, security, coverage, benchmark ratchets, and aiflow task status as dashboard fields, but adoption tools must consume only the stable field list.
knownRisks.followUp: Block dashboard field removals through governance-report-check and keep consumer rows synchronized before publishing release notes or upgrade guidance.

knownRisks.status: .aiflow, .harness, .tmp-test, .trae, coverage.out, and docs/superpowers remain runtime or local evidence paths and must not be committed.
knownRisks.followUp: Keep runtime evidence ignored and stage only durable governance contracts or source changes.

nextRoundRecommendations.action: Promote selected RPC unary and stream surfaces only after P10 release-train evidence survives one hosted release cycle with resolver, balancer, benchmark, and Kitex rollback evidence.
Run generated project compatibility fixtures against a real adopter upgrade branch, classify diffs, and keep generated-project-only dependencies outside the root module.
Run Docker-backed reference app, Helm rendering, kube policy validation, and release evidence gates in hosted CI with Docker, Helm, and security scanning tools available.
